message:
fix(ui): Improve TUI rendering and interaction reliability

Address various TUI edge cases and improve visual feedback for better
user experience during interactive sessions.

Rendering improvements (src/ui/tui.rs):
- Fix scroll position calculation for long result lists
- Improve highlight visibility in low-contrast terminals
- Add loading indicator during async operations
- Better handling of terminal resize events
- Fix cursor positioning after search completion

Interaction improvements:
- Debounce rapid keystrokes to prevent input buffer overflow
- Improve Vim-style navigation responsiveness
- Add visual feedback for mode transitions
- Better error display for failed operations

Edge case fixes:
- Handle empty search results gracefully
- Fix panic on very narrow terminal widths
- Prevent duplicate search triggers
- Clean up properly on unexpected exit

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
